Live Interactive Playground

Test RepoAtlas Engine Live

Change themes, icon packs, exporters, and view instant live rendering updates powered by the core TypeScript engine.

Live Preview•RepoAtlas Monorepo
└─ 📁 RepoAtlas
   ├─ 📁 apps
   │  ├─ 📁 cli
   │  │  ├─  package.json
   │  │  └─ 📁 src
   │  ├─ 📁 docs
   │  │  ├─  package.json
   │  │  └─ 📄 next.config.mjs
   │  └─ 📁 vscode
   │     └─  package.json
   ├─ 📁 packages
   │  ├─ 📁 core
   │  ├─ 📁 renderers
   │  ├─ 📁 exporters
   │  └─ 📁 icons
   ├─  package.json
   ├─  README.md
   └─ 📄 pnpm-workspace.yaml
RepoAtlas

The developer platform that transforms any repository into beautiful, configurable, documentation-ready, AI-friendly visual structures.

Released under MIT License•TypeScript Core
